ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sequencing_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing run */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "sequencing_platform" TEXT /* Sequencing platform used (e.g. Illumina, PacBio, Oxford Nanopore) */,
  "library_type" TEXT /* Type of library prepared (e.g. RNA-seq, ChIP-seq, ATAC-seq) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the sequencing run was performed */,
  "total_reads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads generated */,
  "sequencing_protocol" TEXT /* Sequencing protocol used (e.g. paired-end, single-end) */,
  "sequencing_instrument" TEXT /* Sequencing instrument used (e.g. Illumina HiSeq, PacBio Sequel) */,
  "library_preparation_protocol" TEXT /* Library preparation protocol used */,
  "sequencing_date" TEXT /* Date the sequencing run was completed */,
  "sequencing_center" TEXT /* Sequencing center where the run was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample */,
  "organism" TEXT /* Organism the sample is from */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue the sample is from */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g. tumor, normal, control) */,
  "sample_source" TEXT /* Source of the sample (e.g. blood, tissue, cell line) */,
  "sample_collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_processing_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used to process the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequencing_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequencing data point */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequencing run the data is from */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of nucleotides */,
  "quality" TEXT /* Base quality scores */,
  "read_length" INTEGER /* Length of the read */,
  "read_pair" TEXT /* Read pair (e.g. R1, R2) */,
  "phred_score_offset" INTEGER /* Phred score offset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequencing_data_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control" (
  "qc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control metric */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequencing run the metric is from */,
  "mean_quality" REAL /* Mean base quality score */,
  "stddev_quality" REAL /* Standard deviation of base quality scores */,
  "adapter_content" REAL /* Percentage of adapter content */,
  "q30_base_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of bases with Phred score 30 or higher */,
  "adapter_content_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of adapter content */,
  "duplicate_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of duplicate reads */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quality_control_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alignment_results" (
  "align_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment result */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequencing run the result is from */,
  "reference_genome" TEXT /* Reference genome used for alignment */,
  "alignment_tool" TEXT /* Alignment tool used (e.g. STAR, HISAT2) */,
  "mapped_reads" INTEGER /* Number of reads that mapped to the reference genome */,
  "alignment_score" REAL /* Alignment score */,
  "alignment_identity" REAL /* Alignment identity */,
  "number_of_mismatches" INTEGER /* Number of mismatches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("align_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alignment_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES sequencing_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene annotation */,
  "align_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alignment result the annotation is from */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Biotype of the gene (e.g. protein_coding, non_coding) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anno_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_align_id FOREIGN KEY ("align_id") REFERENCES alignment_results ("align_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expression_values" (
  "expr_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression value */,
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene annotation the value is from */,
  "fpkm" REAL /* FPKM (Fragments Per Kilobase of transcript per Million mapped reads) */,
  "tpm" REAL /* TPM (Transcripts Per Million) */,
  "expression_unit" TEXT /* Unit of expression (e.g. FPKM, TPM, counts) */,
  "expression_source" TEXT /* Source of the expression data (e.g. RNA-seq, microarray) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expr_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expression_values_anno_id FOREIGN KEY ("anno_id") REFERENCES gene_annotations ("anno_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. researcher, administrator) */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "projectstarttime" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the job belongs to */,
  "job_name" TEXT /* Name of the job */,
  "job_type" TEXT /* Type of job (e.g. alignment, expression analysis) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the job (e.g. running, completed, failed) */,
  "job_submission_time" TEXT /* Time the job was submitted */,
  "job_completion_time" TEXT /* Time the job was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jobs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g. BAM, FASTQ, GTF) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g. BAM, FASTQ, GTF) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES jobs ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the metadata belongs to */,
  "meta_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g. organism, tissue_type) */,
  "meta_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "meta_category" TEXT /* Category of the metadata (e.g. sequencing, alignment, expression) */,
  "meta_subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "references" (
  "ref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference genome */,
  "genome_name" TEXT /* Name of the reference genome */,
  "genome_version" TEXT /* Version of the reference genome */,
  "genome_assembly" TEXT /* Assembly of the reference genome */,
  "genome_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the reference genome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ref_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "anno_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "genome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome the annotation belongs to */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* ID of the transcript */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation */,
  "annotation_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anno_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_genome_id FOREIGN KEY ("genome_id") REFERENCES genomes ("genome_id")
)
